subcodes.title: Words to Helen Goodall and Ella Cooper spoken in Jan. 1908
subcodes.first_line: It belongs to the lesson of yesterday. Events like these happen because of the connection between the parts of the universe, for every small part has connection
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @law of cause and effect, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world
